description_long: This object is a spherical mobile phone with a unique, cosmic-inspired design. Its surface is predominantly a deep, dark purple with scattered, glowing magenta and pink specks, resembling a starry night sky or a nebula. The surface features a subtle grid pattern overlay, giving it a high-tech, futuristic appearance. There are no visible buttons, screens, or camera modules, and the form is perfectly round, lacking the typical flat surfaces and edges of conventional mobile phones. The object appears to be made of a hard, glossy material, possibly glass or polished plastic, with a seamless finish. No branding, display content, or external accessories are visible on any side.
description: A spherical mobile phone with a glossy, dark purple surface featuring a cosmic starfield pattern and a subtle grid overlay. The design is seamless, with no visible buttons, screens, or branding.
description_view_0: The object appears almost entirely black with faint hints of purple and a few scattered magenta specks, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_1: More of the starfield pattern is visible, with brighter magenta and pink specks and a subtle grid overlay becoming apparent.
description_view_2: The grid pattern and cosmic coloration are most prominent, with a concentration of bright magenta clouds and star-like specks.
description_view_3: The surface returns to a darker appearance, with some visible starfield and grid pattern, but less vibrant than view 2.
attribute_screen_display_content: none; the screen is either off or not visibly distinguishable from the rest of the surface.
attribute_camera_placement: none visible; no camera modules or lenses are apparent on any side.
